global_description: A medium-sized bird with a stout body and short tail. It has a glossy, iridescent black plumage with a bronzy sheen, especially on the wings and back. The head is slightly rounded, and the beak is short and conical.
discriminative_attributes: Bronzy sheen on wings and back

part_details.plumage: Glossy, iridescent black with a bronzy sheen, especially noticeable on the wings and back.
part_details.beak: Short, conical, and black, suited for seed eating.
part_details.head: Slightly rounded with a smooth, glossy texture.
part_details.tail: Short and slightly rounded, matching the body plumage.

spatial_relations: The bronzy sheen is most prominent on the wings and back.
The short tail extends from the rear of the stout body.
The conical beak is positioned at the front of the rounded head.
